# Agent Cartridge (.acx)

> An open standard + zero-dependency CLI (`acx`) for portable, signed agents and reusable, bounded
> agent-team workflows. A cartridge is a single SQLite file with a signed ROM zone and a mutable SAVE
> zone; an ACX Workflow is a signed `acx.cal/1` JSON graph that can be linted without a local roster and
> staffed later by role, proven level, capability, and stack. An ACX Agent Graph is a signed
> `acx.agent-graph/1` information architecture that declares context ownership, direction, reporting,
> and convergence across loops without embedding knowledge content or granting runtime authority.
> Requires Node >= 22.

## Install & use (for agents)
- Current source checkout: `node --experimental-sqlite src/cli.mjs <cmd>`.
- After the npm release: `npx agent-cartridge@latest <cmd>` or `npm i -g agent-cartridge` then `acx <cmd>`.
- Full agent instructions: /reference/for-agents/  (and AGENTS.md at the repo root)
- Workflow fast path: `acx workflow lint flow.cal.json --publish`; `acx workflow sign flow.cal.json --publisher io.github.you`; `acx workflow verify flow.signed.cal.json`; `acx workflow ready flow.signed.cal.json --cartridges ./roster`.
- Agent Graph fast path: `acx graph lint team.agent-graph.json --publish`; `acx graph sign team.agent-graph.json --publisher io.github.you`; `acx graph verify team.signed.agent-graph.json`; `acx graph inspect team.signed.agent-graph.json`.
- Share fast path: `acx share agent agent.acx --slug agent --dry-run`, `acx share workflow flow.cal.json --dry-run`, or `acx share graph team.agent-graph.json --dry-run`; then prepare, rebuild `registry/index.json`, test, and open a reviewed PR.
- Self-share skill: `skills/acx-share-agent/SKILL.md`.
- Commands: `ls, inspect, verify, spec, check, load, workflow, graph, cal, init, export, strip, level, builder, share`.
- Rule: always `acx verify` before `acx load`; the tool never executes cartridge content; RAC is descriptions only.

## Core docs
- Share agents, workflows, and teams: /share/
- Overview: /concepts/overview/
- The cartridge model (ROM/SAVE): /concepts/cartridge-model/
- The studio (a company of agents): /concepts/studio/
- Bundled loops & agent OS: /concepts/agent-os/

## The format
- Container (single-file SQLite): /format/container/
- Signing & trust (ed25519 + DSSE/in-toto): /format/signing-trust/
- Skills (agentskills.io SKILL.md): /format/skills/
- Capabilities & the sellable claim: /format/capabilities/
- Memory partition (transferable vs field-learned): /format/memory/
- Package specification & LanceDB schema: /format/packages/
- Harness requirements: /format/harness-requirements/
- Loop & context policy: /format/loop-context/
- Loop engineering (CAL + RAC): /format/loops-cal/
- Agent Graph (knowledge ownership, reporting, convergence): /format/agent-graph/
- Required context & the Open Knowledge Format: /format/knowledge-okf/

## Leveling & lifecycle
- How agents level up (provable): /leveling/provable-level/
- From hire to cartridge and back: /lifecycle/company-loop/
- Creating agents & agent sets: /lifecycle/init-agent-set/
- Loading a cartridge: /lifecycle/loading/
- Distribution (OCI): /lifecycle/distribution/
- The exchange (browse/verify/trade): /lifecycle/exchange/
- Sharing over git: /lifecycle/sharing-git/
